zombieTurretFarmCodes.title: Zombie Turret Farm Codes and Free Rewards
zombieTurretFarmCodes.subtitle: Check the current code status and claim the verified daily time skip reward.
zombieTurretFarmCodes.intro: Zombie Turret Farm does not currently list a public code redemption system on its official Roblox page. Players can still unlock the official daily time skip reward by liking the experience and joining the BrainRot Zombies Inc community.

items.reward: No code-based rewards are currently listed by the developer.
instructions: Open the official Zombie Turret Farm Roblox page.
Check the game description and in-game menus after major updates.

Join the BrainRot Zombies Inc Roblox community.
Enter the game after completing both requirements.

zombieTurretFarmBeginnerGuide.title: Zombie Turret Farm Beginner Guide
zombieTurretFarmBeginnerGuide.subtitle: Build your first turret wall, earn cash from zombies, and expand without slowing your progression.
zombieTurretFarmBeginnerGuide.intro: The main loop is simple: place turrets, defeat incoming zombies, collect profit, and reinvest it into stronger defenses. Turrets continue farming while you are logged off, so a balanced wall of upgraded units provides both active and offline progress.

steps.title: Place Your First Turrets
steps.description: Fill the available wall positions with your starting turret rolls so every open slot can attack the zombie lane.
steps.tip: An occupied wall slot provides more immediate farming value than leaving the position empty.

steps.title: Farm Incoming Zombies
steps.description: Let your turrets automatically attack the zombie horde and turn defeated enemies into spendable profit.
steps.tip: Stay in the game during the opening stage so you can reinvest early earnings quickly.

steps.title: Upgrade Your Current Lineup
steps.description: Spend part of your income improving turrets that are already contributing damage instead of relying only on new rolls.
steps.tip: Upgrade the turret covering your weakest section of the wall first.

steps.title: Roll for Stronger Turrets
steps.description: Use the turret rolling system to obtain rarer and stronger options for your defensive wall.
steps.tip: Keep productive turrets in place until a new roll clearly improves the slot.

steps.title: Expand the Base
steps.description: Purchase base expansion when your existing wall is stable and additional turret positions will increase total farming speed.
steps.tip: Do not spend every coin on repeated rolls when an expansion can add another permanent damage source.

steps.title: Prepare for Offline Farming
steps.description: Leave your strongest available turrets placed and upgraded before logging out, because they continue farming while you are offline.
steps.tip: Use the daily time skip reward after joining the official developer community.

zombieTurretFarmTurretTierList.title: Zombie Turret Farm Turret Tier List
zombieTurretFarmTurretTierList.subtitle: Rank your turret rolls by rarity, upgrade investment, and their value in a limited wall slot.
zombieTurretFarmTurretTierList.intro: Zombie Turret Farm directly links turret rarity with strength, while upgrades improve the value of turrets already placed in the base. This progression tier list ranks turret profiles by how efficiently they support active farming, expansion, and offline income.

tiers.label: Best
tiers.name: Highest-Rarity Fully Upgraded Turrets
tiers.bestUse: Permanent placement in the most valuable wall slots.
tiers.priority: Keep, upgrade, and replace only with a clearly stronger roll.

tiers.label: Strong
tiers.name: High-Rarity Turrets
tiers.bestUse: Mid-game farming and preparation for larger base expansions.
tiers.priority: Upgrade after the main damage bottleneck has been identified.

tiers.label: Useful
tiers.name: Upgraded Early-Game Turrets
tiers.bestUse: Filling the wall while saving for stronger rolls and expansions.
tiers.priority: Keep until a rarer turret is ready to take the slot.

tiers.label: Replace
tiers.name: Unupgraded Starter Rolls
tiers.bestUse: Temporary coverage for empty wall positions.
tiers.priority: Replace after obtaining stronger or more upgraded alternatives.

zombieTurretFarmTurretsAndRarities.title: Zombie Turret Farm Turrets and Rarities
zombieTurretFarmTurretsAndRarities.subtitle: Understand how turret rolls, rarity, upgrades, and wall placement affect your farming power.
zombieTurretFarmTurretsAndRarities.intro: Turrets are obtained through the game's rolling system and placed along the base wall to automatically farm zombies. Rarer rolls provide stronger turret options, while upgrades and additional wall space increase the value of your complete lineup.

items.name: Starting Turret Rolls
items.bestUse: Fill empty wall slots and begin generating income immediately.
items.spendingRule: Use them as temporary farming units while building enough income for upgrades and additional rolls.

items.name: Rarer Turret Rolls
items.bestUse: Replace weaker turrets in limited wall positions.
items.spendingRule: Roll when the rest of the base can continue farming without delaying an important upgrade or expansion.

items.name: Upgraded Turrets
items.obtainedFrom: Investing earnings into an existing placed turret
items.bestUse: Increase farming output without waiting for a better roll.
items.spendingRule: Prioritize turrets that already occupy long-term wall slots.

items.name: Offline Farming Lineup
items.obtainedFrom: Leaving upgraded turrets active in the base
items.bestUse: Continue farming zombies while logged off.
items.spendingRule: Upgrade and organize the strongest available lineup before ending a play session.

items.name: Expanded Turret Wall
items.bestUse: Add more simultaneous turret attacks against the zombie lane.
items.spendingRule: Expand when another turret slot provides more value than repeatedly replacing an already functional unit.

zombieTurretFarmUpgradeGuide.title: Best Zombie Turret Farm Upgrade Order
zombieTurretFarmUpgradeGuide.subtitle: Follow a balanced upgrade path that improves zombie clearing, income generation, and long-term progression.
zombieTurretFarmUpgradeGuide.intro: Zombie Turret Farm progression is built around placing turrets, improving your defenses, expanding the base, and rolling rarer turrets. The safest approach is to build a reliable turret wall first, strengthen it, and only then spend heavily on expansion or rarity rolls.

steps.name: Build the Initial Turret Wall
steps.recommendation: Use your first resources to place enough turrets to create a working defensive wall and start earning profit from defeated zombies.
steps.reason: Turrets are the core source of damage and farming income.

steps.name: Upgrade Existing Turrets
steps.recommendation: Improve the turrets already contributing to your farm before repeatedly spending currency on random rarity rolls.
steps.reason: Reliable upgrades immediately strengthen the active base instead of depending on a random result.

steps.name: Expand the Base Gradually
steps.recommendation: Purchase base expansions when you have enough resources to use the newly available space without weakening your current turret wall.
steps.reason: Expansion creates more room for progression, but empty space does not increase farming power.

steps.name: Roll for Rarer Turrets
steps.recommendation: Use the turret roll system after your basic setup is stable. Replace weaker turrets when you obtain rarer and stronger alternatives.
steps.reason: The game identifies higher-rarity turrets as stronger, but rolling should not stop early base development.

steps.name: Claim the Daily Time Skip
steps.recommendation: Like the Roblox experience and join the BrainRot Zombies Inc community to access the daily time skip reward.
steps.reason: The reward adds progression without requiring another normal farming session.

zombieTurretFarmBestBaseLayout.title: Zombie Turret Farm Best Base Layouts
zombieTurretFarmBestBaseLayout.subtitle: Organize your turret wall around consistent coverage, efficient upgrades, and controlled expansion.
zombieTurretFarmBestBaseLayout.intro: The game revolves around building a wall of turrets that automatically farms incoming zombies. A useful layout keeps active turret spaces filled, concentrates upgrades on productive defenses, and avoids expanding faster than your income can support.

layouts.name: Starter Turret Wall
layouts.setup: Create one continuous group of turrets covering the zombie route instead of leaving large gaps between active defenses.
layouts.upgradeFocus: Strengthen the turrets already dealing damage before making the base larger.
layouts.nextStep: Begin rolling for stronger replacements after the wall produces steady income.

layouts.name: Balanced Expansion Layout
layouts.setup: Expand the base one section at a time and place turrets in the new usable space before purchasing another expansion.
layouts.upgradeFocus: Keep the original upgraded turret group active while adding new turrets around it.
layouts.nextStep: Replace weaker turrets with rarer rolls without removing too much active damage at once.

layouts.name: AFK Farming Layout
layouts.setup: Fill available useful spaces with your strongest current turret setup and complete upgrades before logging off.
layouts.upgradeFocus: Prioritize stable overall farming power rather than saving all currency for future rolls.
layouts.nextStep: Collect offline earnings after returning, then upgrade, expand, or roll before the next AFK session.

layouts.name: Layout Mistakes to Avoid
layouts.setup: Avoid buying expansion while leaving earlier spaces unused, keeping stronger turrets unplaced, or spending every coin on rarity rolls before building a functional wall.
layouts.upgradeFocus: Do not spread currency across unnecessary purchases when one reliable turret group can be improved first.
layouts.nextStep: Review the layout after every major expansion or stronger turret roll.

zombieTurretFarmAFKFarmingGuide.title: Zombie Turret Farm AFK and Offline Farming
zombieTurretFarmAFKFarmingGuide.subtitle: Prepare your turret wall before leaving so the base can continue generating useful progress while you are offline.
zombieTurretFarmAFKFarmingGuide.intro: Zombie Turret Farm officially supports offline farming, meaning placed turrets continue working after you log out. The best offline routine is to spend available resources, equip stronger turrets, and claim the daily time skip whenever it is available.

methods.requirement: Place turrets and leave the game
methods.benefit: Your turret farm continues operating while you are logged off.
methods.bestUse: Regular breaks, school, work, or overnight progression.
methods.preparation: Place your strongest available turrets and spend useful upgrade currency before leaving.

methods.requirement: Upgrade the active turret wall before logging out
methods.benefit: Starts the offline period with a stronger working base.
methods.bestUse: Players with saved currency and an established turret wall.
methods.preparation: Improve existing defenses before purchasing another empty base expansion.

methods.requirement: Roll and place rarer, stronger turrets
methods.benefit: Replaces weaker parts of the farm with stronger turret options.
methods.bestUse: Players whose basic base and upgrade progression are already stable.
methods.preparation: Place successful rolls immediately instead of leaving stronger turrets unused.

methods.requirement: Like the game and join the BrainRot Zombies Inc community
methods.benefit: Provides an additional daily progression reward connected to offline farming.
methods.preparation: Complete the community requirements and claim the reward when available.

methods.requirement: Return after an offline session and collect the resulting progress
methods.benefit: Turns offline earnings into stronger turrets, upgrades, expansions, or new rarity rolls.
methods.preparation: Reinvest before beginning another offline farming period.

zombieTurretFarmUpdates.title: Latest Zombie Turret Farm Changes and Features
zombieTurretFarmUpdates.subtitle: Review the confirmed launch systems, progression features, offline rewards, and developer notices.
zombieTurretFarmUpdates.intro: Zombie Turret Farm is a new Roblox release from BrainRot Zombies Inc. Its current version focuses on automated zombie farming, turret upgrades, base expansion, rarity rolls, offline progression, and a community-based daily reward.

entries.title: Automated Zombie Farming
entries.summary: Players place turrets that attack incoming zombies and convert successful farming into profit.
changes: Turret placement is the central gameplay mechanic.
The base is designed around building a wall of automated defenses.

entries.title: Base Upgrades and Expansion
entries.summary: The progression system allows players to improve their setup and expand the size of their base.
changes: Existing defenses can be improved through progression upgrades.
Base expansion provides additional room for development.
Players can reinvest farming income into stronger setups.

entries.title: Turret Rarity Rolls
entries.summary: Players can roll for rarer turret variants that are identified as stronger than basic options.
changes: Turrets are obtained through a rarity-based roll system.
Rarer results provide stronger turret options.
New rolls can be used to replace weaker parts of the base.

entries.title: Offline Turret Farming
entries.summary: Placed turrets continue farming after the player logs out of the experience.
changes: Progress can continue between active sessions.
Players can prepare the base before leaving.
Returned earnings can be reinvested into upgrades, expansion, or rolls.

entries.title: Daily Time Skip
entries.summary: Players can unlock a daily time skip by liking the experience and joining the developer community.
changes: The reward is connected to the official BrainRot Zombies Inc community.
It can be added to the normal offline progression routine.
Players should check the experience regularly to claim the daily benefit.

entries.title: New-Release Bug Monitoring
entries.summary: The official game description identifies Zombie Turret Farm as a new release and notes that players may encounter occasional bugs.
changes: The experience is still in its early release period.
Gameplay systems may receive fixes and adjustments.
The official Roblox experience and developer community are the primary update channels.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Zombie Turret Farm

questions.question: What is Zombie Turret Farm?
questions.answer: Zombie Turret Farm is a Roblox idle turret defense game where you place turrets along a base wall, defeat incoming zombies for cash, upgrade and expand your farm, roll rarer turrets, and keep earning income while offline.

questions.question: Are there any working Zombie Turret Farm codes?
questions.answer: Zombie Turret Farm does not currently list a public code redemption system on its official Roblox page. Players can still unlock the official daily time skip reward by liking the experience and joining the BrainRot Zombies Inc community.

questions.question: Does Zombie Turret Farm keep farming while you are offline?
questions.answer: Yes. Placed turrets continue farming zombies after you log out, so upgrading your strongest available turret wall before leaving improves your offline income.

questions.question: How do turret rolls and rarities work in Zombie Turret Farm?
questions.answer: Turrets are obtained through the game's rolling system and placed along the base wall. Rarer rolls provide stronger turret options, while upgrades increase the value of the turrets already in your lineup.

questions.question: Who developed Zombie Turret Farm?
questions.answer: Zombie Turret Farm is developed by BrainRot Zombies Inc and is available to play for free on Roblox.

questions.question: What is the best way to progress in Zombie Turret Farm?
questions.answer: Build a reliable turret wall first, upgrade the turrets already contributing damage, expand the base gradually, then roll for rarer turrets and claim the daily time skip reward.
